top_signals.title: Oracle Bonds Rally as It Signals Disciplined Funding Outlook
top_signals.summary: Oracle Corp. bonds rallied on Thursday even as its shares tumbled, after the database giant calmed debt investors by saying it doesn’t expect additional bond issuance this calendar year and outlining plans to raise $40 billion of debt and equity in the current fiscal year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: N.O.R.E. & DJ EFN Want To Become the Def Jam of Podcasts
top_signals.summary: After hitting 500 episodes, Rapper N.O.R.E & DJ EFN, hosts of the show ‘Drink Champs,' discuss what they wanted from the show when it first started, and how it came to be. The two discuss their music careers, hip-hop culture, and their experience navigating the business side of it all. They speak with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Time to axe ‘unfair’ triple lock, suggests UK’s cost of living tsar
top_signals.summary: Lord Richard Walker, who was appointed by Starmer in February, has called the system ‘mathematically unsustainable’

top_signals.title: Energy Fuels expects to hit 2026 uranium guidance by midyear
top_signals.summary: Company forecasts uranium production to reach 1.6 million lb. by the end of June, within its full-year guidance range of 1.5-2.5 million lb.
